少量毒点，因为剧情太过典型套路化。标准的工业糖精，带一点微病娇。作者在认真发糖，应该不会作妖。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1758626465,"group_id":"7474868056590650392","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4+Z0r7/v04iDtof7sDQKgg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"75943930630","user_name":"清澈见底的欧洲祖母"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"75943930630","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7474868056590650392","book_info":{"abstract":"小说改编短剧：病娇女帝：找到你了我的太傅大人  
【单女主】【病娇护夫女总裁】【纯甜文】【日常文，无修仙】
林衍被女帝培养系统选中，需要去平行世界里帮助女主成为女帝。
第一个世界，他只坚持了一个月就被下线了……
第二个世界，他多坚持了几个月……
第九个世界，他终于将女主送上女帝的宝座。然而就在女帝登基前夕，因为一次误会，以为女帝要杀掉自己的林衍借假死离开了。
待祭天仪式钟声响起的那天，林衍终于完成任务回到了自己的世界。
对新生活充满期待的他来到早已心仪的大学。
然而就在新生报道的这天，原本应该在另一个世界的女帝竟出现在他的面前。
白洛颜勾起林衍的下巴，眼中闪着病态的红光说道：
“找到你了，我的太傅大人~~~”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1f5d4c1418c3aef8397b11bf70da9723","author":"我想喝酸奶","author_id":"","book_id":"7474868056590650392","book_name":"病娇女帝：太傅你就从了我吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7474868127784763928","read_count":"16526","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1032818"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"487","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,女帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/794677066c717334ef5930c4f4ef0e5c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256593&x-signature=PHGGH73Hr%2BdcOrD2H74mvb%2F%2FdkI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2568912819201932","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"44"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321135633F805917317F716E0FE86"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读57分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3412,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":11396},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":f
